name: assess
description: Outside-in AI systems readiness assessment. Builds a probabilistic model of an organization's systems before asking anything — starting from seed info as scant as a company name — then layers fidelity L0 (silhouette) → L4 (human) through recursive research and inference-anchored questioning. Skills: assess-state, assess-researcher, assess-harvester, assess-inquirer, assess-scorer, assess-reporter, assess-orchestrator.
